rationale: Corpus 'Senior/Staff' bucket has 3 points from 2 companies (Greenhouse Senior Implementation Consultant $79.3K-$95K; Pendo Senior [role] ~$145.4K-$175K). File's L5 base p50 ($189K) runs meaningfully above both real data points (corpus median $145.6K), a ~25-30% gap. Raising low→medium because real per-level anchors now exist and are the right order of magnitude, but flagging a real overstatement concern rather than calling this well-confirmed.
